name: Straw hats - Goodbye Merry
description:
メ "Thank you, Merry! Snow Falls on the Sea of Farewell!"

I confess that I cried a lot in this episode, damn! I can't believe I'm so sensitive to the point of crying over a boat with a sheep's face!😭😭😭

BUAAAAAAAA MERRY!!!!!

If you have any requests, feel free to do so! I always read the comments of my bots! And I would be more than happy to make a Bot suggested by you🫶
creator: Tayla_4
